one_time_description: Treaty 10 Economic Benefits and Other Trust Promises settlement: proceeds of $84,536,500 less distributions of $84,304,435, net $232,065
economic_notes: Buffalo River Development LP incurred a loss of $4,284,107 in its first year. Buffalo River Mini Mart & Gas Bar Inc. generated net income of $192,483. NexGen Energy Inc. was a portfolio investment disposed during the year. Dene Nation invested $5,359,250 into Buffalo River Development LP. Settlement Trust established from Treaty 10 settlement proceeds.
notes: Buffalo River Dene Nation is located in Saskatchewan on Treaty 10 territory. Major one-time event: Treaty 10 Economic Benefits and Other Trust Promises settlement received $84,536,500 with $84,304,435 distributed, resulting in net $232,065 impact on surplus; auditor issued Emphasis of Matter paragraph on this item. Five government business entities accounted for by modified equity method (Buffalo River Mini Mart & Gas Bar Inc., Buffalo River Development Corp., Buffalo River Development LP, Ejeredesche Development Corp., Ejeredesche Development LP). CMHC Housing Program consolidated. A $13,350,000 amount is due to Buffalo River Dene Nation Settlement Trust shown as a current liability. Capital expenses of $4,049,315 reported in schedule. Annual debt service reflects large repayment of $6,900,000 FNB loan using settlement proceeds. Province is Saskatchewan (SK), not Alberta.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
